title: ottochloa gracillima
intro: Ottochloa gracillima, also known as Slender Wood Grass, is a species of grass native to the tropical regions of Africa and Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Ottochloa gracillima is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed orally.
